description: Evaluation test cases for the deep-research skill

evals.name: comparison-query
evals.prompt: I'm building a new startup and need to decide between PostgreSQL and Supabase for our database. Can you do a comprehensive comparison? We're expecting moderate traffic (maybe 10k daily users) and need good realtime features.
evals.expected_output: A detailed comparison report covering features, pricing, scalability, realtime capabilities, and recommendations with citations from multiple sources.

assertions.name: report_length
assertions.criteria: Report should have at least 2000 words

assertions.name: source_count
assertions.criteria: Report should cite at least 10 sources

assertions.name: section_completeness
assertions.criteria: All required sections present (Executive Summary, Introduction, Main Analysis, Synthesis, Limitations, Recommendations, Bibliography)

assertions.name: complete_bibliography
assertions.criteria: All citations in text have corresponding bibliography entries

evals.name: trend-analysis
evals.prompt: What are the key trends in AI agent frameworks in 2025? I'm trying to understand the landscape for a technical report I'm writing. Focus on things like multi-agent orchestration, tool use patterns, and the main players in the space.
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive trend analysis covering multi-agent frameworks, tool use, major players (LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, etc.), with citations from recent sources.

assertions.name: report_length
assertions.criteria: Report should have at least 3000 words

assertions.name: source_count
assertions.criteria: Report should cite at least 15 sources

assertions.name: recency
assertions.criteria: At least 50% of sources should be from 2024-2025

assertions.name: topic_coverage
assertions.criteria: Should cover multi-agent orchestration, tool use, and major frameworks

evals.name: technical-decision
evals.prompt: I need to build a real-time dashboard for displaying internal analytics data. We have about 50 concurrent users, need sub-second latency, and our data comes from PostgreSQL. What's the best approach for the tech stack?
evals.expected_output: A technical research report comparing approaches (WebSockets vs SSE, frontend frameworks, backend options) with specific recommendations for this use case.

assertions.name: report_length
assertions.criteria: Report should have at least 2000 words

assertions.name: source_count
assertions.criteria: Report should cite at least 10 sources

assertions.name: technical_depth
assertions.criteria: Should discuss WebSockets, SSE, latency, and specific tech options

assertions.name: actionable_recommendations
assertions.criteria: Recommendations section should have specific, actionable advice
